description: Create a two-column content slide on JPMorgan Private Markets Fund with side-by-side bullet lists for portfolio solution and competitive advantages.

header.headline: JPMorgan Private Markets Fund ("JPMF") provides investors private equity exposure in a simplified structure

items.text: Portfolio Construction: Secondaries & co-investments mitigate j-curve & compound returns
Portfolio Construction: Core PE or complementary small-mid exposure
Simplified Structure: Day-one exposure to PE
Simplified Structure: Monthly reporting, no capital calls, potential quarterly liquidity
Small-Mid Market Focus: Large investable universe
Small-Mid Market Focus: Multiple avenues for exit
Multi-Manager Strategy: Access top quartile General Partners
Deep Knowledge & Expertise: 45+ years of experience
Deep Knowledge & Expertise: Access of world's largest financial institution

footer.source: 1 The strategy expects to offer investors limited quarterly liquidity through a tender offer process. Under normal market conditions, the Adviser expects to recommend that the Fund repurchase 5% of its outstanding shares at their net asset value. No assurance can be given that such tender offers will be approved by the Board. If a tender offer is oversubscribed, investors may be subject to pro rata reduction in the Shares ultimately repurchased by the Fund. All terms of each tender offer will be publicly disclosed. 2 Active GP relationships based on positive Net Asset Value ("NAV") of PEG platform investments since inception as of 12/31/2025. 3 Includes investing experience at both PEG and AT&T Investment Management Corporation (ATTIMCO). Portfolio Management team average tenure represents voting eligible members.
